steps.name: Given user goes to "electronics-on-emis" page of "BFLHome" website
When user plays electronics popup video
Then user verifies BFLElectronics Popup player functions Play,Mute,Quality,Fullscreen,SeekToEnd,Replay,Forward,Rewind,Speed using player "kPlayer1"
